pr.head: cursor/product-category-lock-v1
pr.founder_gate: Founder GO 2026-07-23 (wiring plan W0-05); blanket approval recorded in noetfeld-OS Claude session f5da4b7f. Per contract W0-05 founder_gate.note: the PR merge itself is the founder act.

merge.note_unpushed_commits: Branch tip was 7 commits ahead of origin/cursor/product-category-lock-v1 (incl. 9ec41c9 Wiring & Commissioning Plan v1 lock). These are the builder lane's committed work that the founder-approved deliverable description references (wiring contract + sha256 lock); they are included in the push that lands this PR.

classification_and_resolution.evidence: For every file below, the branch-side blob (git rev-parse HEAD:<path>) appears verbatim in origin/main's history for the same path: main once contained exactly the branch's content (language-layer PR #13 lineage) and evolved past it (harden/ratify/align/close commits). Not a blind --theirs.

classification_and_resolution.resolution: take origin/main (blob-ancestry supersession); plus one additive registration, see registry_addition
classification_and_resolution.evidence: Branch blobs of all three registries appear verbatim in origin/main history; branch never held registry content absent from main's lineage, so no key union was required. Verified additionally that no data file on the branch (github_automation_registry, automation_surface_inventory, workflow_census_extensions) ever referenced category-drift-guard, so nothing was dropped.

docs/CROSS_DOMAIN_AUTH_PROPOSAL_v1.1_LOCKED.md branch blob is in main's history; main's current version carries the founder-side ratify/align evolution (9197390, f459d1a). No locked doctrine was edited; a stale duplicate of pre-evolution content was discarded.
P99-LEDGER ratify doc: branch blob in main history; main's version includes later Phase-1-close appends (0d39f23). No receipt content was dropped; the branch side was an earlier strict subset state.
language_gate/dictionary_rc2_supplement.json branch blob in main history; main regenerated/extended it (+641 lines).
Library docs and dispatch docs: branch blobs in main history; main evolved them further.

classification_and_resolution.resolution: hand-merge (zdiff3), both hunks resolved to main's side; branch-unique content survives via clean auto-merge regions
classification_and_resolution.evidence: AGENTS.md hunk 1: base and branch empty at anchor, main added 0c-0i LOCKED skill entries -> kept main's. Hunk 2: branch deleted base's old item 4 (superseded by the 4-7 list both sides share); main also deleted it and added item 8 commissioning-specialist -> kept main's. Surviving branch-unique content: L0 repo-graph broad-read gate section and corrected venture workspace paths (~/Desktop/Noetfield-Systems/... replacing stale ~/Projects/...). Escalation class per skill 1; resolved under the founder's explicit W0-05 GO covering this PR's conflict resolution.

registry_addition.reason: Branch shipped .github/workflows/category-drift-guard-v1.yml (a named PR deliverable) with no registry entry in any branch data file; validate_parallel_automation_governance_v1 enforces workflow-to-registry 1:1 and FAILed on the merged tree. Entry mirrors gh_actions_p0pgr_shadow_cycle_v1 (workflow_dispatch-only, founder-gated cron, read-only). Fixes the system per canon rather than landing a red governance gate on main.
registry_addition.wake_path_note: No active schedule (cron commented pending FOUNDER-UNLOCK-DRIFT-CRON receipt), so no schedule passport required under NF_WAKE_PATH_CONFLICT_POLICY.

untracked_collision.action: untracked copy removed after byte-identical diff against origin/main's tracked version; scratchpad backup kept

preserved_state.worktree_stash: stash 'pre-W0-05-merge: builder lane graph-out generated churn (preserve)' holds uncommitted graph-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md + graph-out/graph_index_v1.json modifications (generated artifacts)

exit 0; warnings about noetfeld-OS workflows missing from inventory are cross-repo and pre-existing
FAIL (SSOT drift advisory) — identical FAIL on untouched main checkout; pre-existing, not merge-caused
